title: Specific Ricoh MFP and Printer Products - Buffer overflow vulnerability(CVE-2024-47939) in Pro 8200S/8210S/8220S
explanation: Ricoh has identified a buffer overflow vulnerability(CVE-2024-47939) affecting Pro 8200S/8210S/8220S
affect: Receiving a crafted request by a remote third party can lead to a denial of service (DoS) attack or changes to some device settings.

models.name: Pro 8200S/8210S/8220S
models.version: Web Support :1.10 or earlier, WebUapl:1.02 or earlier, Printer:1.09 or earlier

checkVersion:
How to view the firmware version:
1. Access Web Image Monitor from your browser.
https://"IP address or hostname of the device"
2. Log in with Administrator privileges.
3. Navigate to Device Management > Configuration > Device Settings > Firmware Update
measures: Please request service technicians to update the firmware to the latest version.
contact: Please contact your local Ricoh representative or dealer if you have any queries.

history.changes: Updated CVSSv3 base score and Potential impact
